title: accelerator
text: accelerator A keystroke or combination of keystrokes that performs an action, such as Ctrl+O to open a file. Synonyms: shortcut key, keyboard shortcut Related Links access key A character in a widget label or menu item that when pressed, often in combination with Alt, gives focus to, or activates, the widget or menu item. Define Keyboard Shortcuts for Menu Items Menu definitions can define keyboard shortcuts that enable the user to select a menu item using the keyboard rather than the mouse. Keyboard shortcuts can be defined as an access key or an accelerator key. [accelerators] The [accelerators] section of the initialization file enables you to map a logical function, such as fileopen to a keyboard sequence (an accelerator) such as Ctrl+F7.
